title: Treefall
description: simple mod that makes entire tree fall on the ground
body:
![Treefall Mod GIF](https://media3.giphy.com/media/v1.Y2lkPTc5MGI3NjExNHh0dmdzZXVrcjkzM2Q5ZzQwbWhyZjFsbDVocDI2dmRuajhyM2t4eiZlcD12MV9pbnRlcm5hbF9naWZfYnlfaWQmY3Q9Zw/0La5zNGR4HfooMHEkg/giphy.gif)

**Treefall** is a simple Minecraft mod that makes entire trees "fall" to the ground, saving you time and effort! No more chopping down each block—just take down the trunk,and the whole tree comes crashing down. It's all about making wood collection quicker and easier :)
